examples: Fluorescent lights use electricity to excite mercury vapor. This produces ultraviolet light that causes a phosphor coating inside the bulb to glow.
This strikes the phosphor on the glass walls and makes it glow brightly.
The simplest and most common way is to coat a blue LED with a yellow phosphor.
The Phosphor Reveal watch line skillfully blends design and technology to craft the ultimate fashion timepiece.
Phosphor Reveal marks the world's first mechanical digital watches utilizing its proprietary Micro-Magnetic Mechanical DigitalTM (M3D) technology.
